quotes.text: Churn is the silent killer. You can celebrate new customers all day, but if the bucket has holes, you're just wasting water.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Churn is the tax you pay for not making your product indispensable.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The 'cancel flow' is where SaaS companies reveal their true character. Make it easy and people will come back. Make it hard and they'll never come back.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The most important user is the one who's about to leave. Build for them first.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: SaaS churn is like a leaky bucket. You can pour water in as fast as you want, but if the holes are big, you're wasting time.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The user who gives you critical feedback is your best friend. The user who silently leaves is your biggest risk.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to reduce churn is to make your product indispensable. Not by locking people in. By being too useful to leave.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best SaaS businesses have a 'churn rate' that's under 5%. If yours is over 10%, you have a retention problem.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your churn rate tells you more about your product than your acquisition rate ever will.
quotes.author: based
